list.vod_content: The plot revolves around Richard Bean (Kline), a Broadway star known for his egotism, who experiences a public breakdown and retreats to his hometown. After returning to the family-run theater where he first discovered his talent, he finds his father, the former artistic director, suffering from dementia. list.vod_blurb: 第四季改编自Tony Hillerman创作的原著系列第六本《The Ghostway》。 为了寻找一名失踪的纳瓦霍少女，Leaphorn、Chee和Manuelito离开纳瓦霍国的安全环境，去往了1970年代洛杉矶的险恶之地。三人与时间赛跑，试图从一名与有组织犯罪集团有牵连的偏执杀手手中救下她。
